subcodes.first_line: After completion of the response to thy numerous communications, two further letters dated the twenty-ninth were received from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از اتمام جواب مراسلات متعدده آنجناب از قبل دو مراسله دیگر که تاریخ آن ۲۹
subcodes.subjects: @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
